records.profile_description: An overt lexical predicate is repeated around negator 唔 to form an A-not-A interrogative constituent, either as a matrix question or as an embedded interrogative complement, as in 食唔食 and 嚟唔嚟. The profile excludes suppletive 有冇, lexical 得唔得 and 可唔可以 profiles, final-未 completion questions, and arbitrary truncation of disyllabic predicates.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ANotAQuestion is a legitimate linguistic family name, but the current UUID combines canonical V-唔-V forms, embedded interrogatives, and suppletive 有冇 sequences. M4MarkedANotAInterrogative preserves the strongest shared overt structure and makes the negator boundary searchable. Suppletive and lexeme-specific profiles must not inherit its evidence automatically. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the overt V-唔-V profile; remove suppletive 有冇 from this UUID during compatibility migration and allocate or reuse a separate source-bounded 有冇 interrogative identity

records.profile_description: The runtime recognizes an overt adjacent `得唔得` sequence when it is terminal, including the checked source example `而家問題係佢嗰度得唔得先。` with postposed `先`. It must not treat preverbal restrictive-focus `得` as the same construction merely because another `得` and `唔` occur later in the clause.

The checked source directly attests overt action material followed by clause-final `都得` to mark that the action is feasible. The parser now reserves `AcceptabilityClause` for that bounded overt-action profile and does not assign it to standalone, nominal/wh-only, or overt free-choice `…都得` strings.

An implementation aggregate over an action predicate followed either by quantified nominal material, as in 寫三個字, or by a duration-question expression, as in 等幾耐. The wrapper does not establish a stative predicate or one Cantonese construction shared by object quantity and duration questions.

source_terms.term: nominal continuation in 寫三個字

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy label assigns a stative analysis where the executable positives contain either a quantified object or a wh-duration expression. The runtime grouping is useful only as historical compatibility metadata. It should cease competing for linguistic promotion and decompose into independently supported object, quantity, predicate, and duration structures. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; represent quantified objects through ordinary argument and classifier-NP structure and duration questions through independently typed temporal or measure structure

records.profile_description: The active parser already represents subject plus property/stative predication elsewhere; the dormant label adds no unique boundary and its categorical name overstates the analysis.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ApproximateQuantity; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An overt nominal modifier followed by 嘅 and an overt nominal head. The profile preserves possessive and attributive modification without assigning one uniform semantic role to 嘅 and does not cover the distinct associative-plural X + (佢)哋 construction.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The runtime behavior is a real 嘅-marked nominal-modification profile, but AssociativeNP names a different construction in the relevant literature and invites a false plural analysis. The same UUID should be retained because the implemented structural profile does not need to split; only the canonical name and documentation need correction. Status recommendation: keep unsupported_generalization only until the versioned runtime alias migration; then move the narrowed record to research_pending

records.profile_description: The name can be read as classifier-alone ellipsis, while the defensible future question is overt classifier+noun C-N structure. Preserve that question at family level and retire the unused label.
The subject wrapper inherited all analysis from an unsourced exact 整冧咗 predicate bundle.
The exact 整 + 冧 + 咗 path did not establish a reusable causative-result predicate.

The lexical change-of-state predicate 變成 followed by wh complement 點. The currently supported node is limited to this overt predicate-complement span and excludes aspectual 變咗做, two-verb causative-resultatives, nominal-result complements, disposal wrappers, and other wh complements.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ChangeIntoPredicate implies a broad result-complement construction that the runtime no longer implements. The only source-linked positive is the lexeme-specific 變成點 wh-complement profile, and the checked sources explicitly distinguish it from 變咗做 and two-verb resultatives. BinSingDimWhComplementVP therefore names the actual supported span without claiming nominal-result or productive complement selection. Status recommendation: retain research_pending as a lexeme-specific complement profile; do not treat it as a productive general change-into construction until nominal and additional wh complements have direct evidence and executable boundaries

records.profile_description: The runtime groups overt classifier + noun material on bounded object-consumer paths. The sources support a role-neutral classifier–noun NP, not an object-only Cantonese construction.
Canto Span does not claim that ClauseRelationEdge is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is an internal structural representation.
Canto Span does not claim that ClauseRelationGraph is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is an internal structural representation.
Canto Span does not claim that ClauseRelationMemberSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is an internal structural representation.
Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.

An overt subject followed by lexical 知, optionally preceded by 唔, and a visible clausal or interrogative complement, as in 我知佢唔嚟, 我知如果佢去我就去, and 我唔知佢嚟唔嚟. The profile does not generalize to every cognition verb, nominal content, reported thought, or stance-marking construction.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. CognitionContentFrame is too broad and uses the vague head Frame. The executable profile is consistently lexical 知 or 唔知 plus visible clausal content. ZiClausalComplementClause names the actual predicate and complement type while preventing unsupported transfer to 覺得, 諗住, reported thought, stance particles, or nominal objects. Status recommendation: retain research_pending under a lexeme-specific name; obtain exact external support for 知 complement classes and reconcile the runtime before any promotion track

records.profile_description: The generic post-吓 object wrapper erased the sourced distinction between nominal and clausal content.
Cognition + 吓 adds no overt structure beyond ordinary delimitative predication.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by CognitionStatementClause; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

The standalone Comment node never survived complete parser output, had no accepted fixture or standardized case, and duplicated comment/comment_predicate role metadata already carried by TopicComment.
The fallback treated stative plus 啲 as a generic comparative whenever the governed degree template lacked lexical slot metadata; the only probe 客氣啲 is better represented as scalar adjustment.

An implementation wrapper over short material following 覺得, including 有, 係, 唔係, and subject-plus-係 strings. These surfaces may involve aspectual VP ellipsis, contextual object omission, existential or possessive predication, copular structure, or response-particle material and are not established as one Cantonese complement-ellipsis fragment construction.

source_terms.term: VP movement and ellipsis with 有/冇

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The current record conflates several short complements whose analyses differ fundamentally. Some contain an overt subject, some may be complete response-particle expressions, and the 有 example is not licensed by the same evidence as 係 or 唔係. The UUID should therefore preserve only the compatibility wrapper and leave linguistic promotion to independently bounded successors. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; allocate or reuse separate language identities only for independently sourced VP ellipsis, object omission, and response-particle or copular profiles

records.profile_description: A predicate contains an overt completion, result, or aspect marker such as 完 or 咗 and is followed by final 未, optionally with an overt object and final particle, as in 食完飯未, 食咗飯未, and 食咗未. The profile excludes the current bare-VP + 未 branch, A-not-A questions, scalar questions, and any inference that structural recognition validates predicate-object compatibility.

source_terms.term: completion question with visible completion/result particle or aspect marker

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. CompletionQuestion is defensible as a semantic description but hides the overt markers that provide its actual source authorization. AspectMarkedMeiCompletionQuestion makes the formal boundary explicit and prevents the unsupported bare-VP route from inheriting the evidence. Predicate-object compatibility remains a separate semantic-selection concern. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the visibly completion- or aspect-marked profile; quarantine bare VP + 未 until independently sourced and keep semantic selection review separate from construction recognition

records.profile_description: The wrapper forced completion structure, 就, and a later event into one optional-subject template even though the sourced sequence has independently overt subjects and is not a conditional.

A lexical predicate followed by overt 完 as a completion or phase marker, optionally with an overt object. The resulting VP may occur inside independently represented negation, outer-perfective, clause-linking, or final-未 question structure. The profile excludes 晒 and other completion or result markers, and it does not treat outer 咗 or final 未 as part of this UUID or assume that V完咗O is uniformly natural across speakers and contexts.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. CompletionVP is too broad because its current positives combine the source-supported V + 完 predicate with 晒, outer 咗, final-未 questions, negation, and larger clause-linking contexts. The outer structures may contain the same V + 完 constituent without belonging to its permanent identity. WanMarkedCompletionVP retains the dominant source-supported core while preventing 晒 and unrelated completion markers from inheriting its evidence. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the V + 完 completion profile; remove 晒 and other marker-specific branches from this UUID during compatibility migration and keep the native-conflicted V完咗O composition under the project's higher-burden evidence rule

records.profile_description: The independently attested three-part directional strings 返上嚟 and 返上去, analyzed as return plus upward direction plus deictic 嚟 or 去. The profile excludes two-part 上嚟, manner-verb-plus-directional predicates such as 行返過嚟, arbitrary 返-initial combinations, and unreviewed object-placement patterns.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. CompoundDirectionalMotionVP is compatible with the literature but still sounds broader than the implemented profile and does not expose the defining 返 + 上 + 嚟/去 sequence. ReturnUpDeicticDirectionalVP identifies the exact source-linked subtype while avoiding a claim that all compound directionals share its constituency, object order, or productivity. Status recommendation: retain research_pending until additional tri-syllabic directional contrasts, object-placement boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: The wrapper reduced a clause relation to action + 就 + stative slots even though sourced conditionals vary in marker, subject, modality, and predicate type; its only executable case was a zero-weight lexical fallback.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ConditionalClause; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

Two independently analyzed NPs joined by overt conjunction 同 or 同埋. The profile preserves both conjuncts, excludes comitative or coverb uses of 同, and does not claim nested, non-NP, or unbounded coordination.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The canonical name is standard and the current runtime behavior already implements a defensible narrow subtype: overt binary NP coordination. The earlier unsupported-generalization status reflects incomplete evidence and scope closure, not a bad label. The family should be Coordination rather than the legacy combined AssociativeAndCoordinatedNP family. Status recommendation: move from unsupported_generalization to research_pending after the note and status path are migrated to the adjudicated binary-NP scope

records.profile_description: The runtime recognizes overt full `係唔係` when it is followed by an explicit complement that is either a typed predicate/clause or a bounded nominal or possessive expression. It does not use this label for utterance-final `係唔係` tags with no following complement.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by CopularIdentificationFrame; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by CopularRelationFrame; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

A clause contains an overt coverb followed by its NP complement before an independently analyzed VP, currently exemplified by locative 喺 + NP and participant-marking 同 + NP. The profile records the shared preverbal structure without assigning one semantic relation to all coverbs. It excludes conjunction 同, postverbal result-location phrases, bare locative phrases without a following VP, and unrestricted licensing of every coverb lexeme or ordering.

source_terms.term: 同 as with or together with
同 as 跟 or 替

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. CoverbFrame names a documented structural family, but Frame is vague and the runtime supports only a bounded preverbal coverb + NP + VP profile. PreverbalCoverbNPClause exposes the observable order and keeps the common structure separate from marker-specific semantic roles. The same UUID can be retained because the locative 喺 and participant-marking 同 examples share the source-recognized coverb configuration; their lexical meanings remain independently constrained. Status recommendation: retain research_pending as a bounded preverbal coverb-NP structural profile; require marker-specific semantic and lexical evidence before any productive promotion

records.profile_description: The non-licensing internal child duplicated ordinary wh/NP complement material and had no independent source.
The exact 係…嚟㗎 wrapper was a source-free parser heuristic.

An overt action predicate is followed by a property or manner expression and 啲, as in 行快啲, 講慢啲, and 講大聲啲. The profile excludes preposed 啲-marked manner expressions, standalone or elliptical property + 啲 directives such as 客氣啲 and 快啲, and discourse-separated material whose attachment to a following VP is not established.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy name does not distinguish postverbal manner adjustment from standalone scalar directives. Three executable positives instantiate a coherent and directly attested V + property + 啲 profile, while the remaining positives lack an overt modified verb. PostverbalDiMannerAdjustmentVP retains the source-supported core and prevents directive or discourse-unit evidence from being transferred into the adverbial construction. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the postverbal V + property + 啲 profile; move standalone or elliptical property + 啲 outputs to independently adjudicated profiles during compatibility migration

records.profile_description: An implementation wrapper combining a preposed 啲-marked manner expression such as 快啲 with an independently analyzed following VP. It excludes postverbal 行快啲 and discourse-separated 靜啲，佢喺度畫畫, and it does not itself establish a separate language construction beyond the manner expression and VP components.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The evidence supports a preposed 啲-marked manner expression and separately supports its ordering contrasts; it does not require a second language-level node spanning the modifier and the entire VP. The current label therefore duplicates compositional structure and should survive, if needed, only as an internal aggregate wrapper. Status recommendation: move to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; attach linguistic evidence to the independently typed 啲-marked manner adverbial and the following VP rather than to the aggregate wrapper

records.profile_description: An implementation wrapper combining an independently recognized degree modifier with a dictionary-backed lexicalized stative. The exact attested surface 好好食 belongs linguistically to ordinary degree modification plus the lexical stative 好食; the wrapper is not an independently supported productive construction.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The exact example is well attested, but the evidence supports composition rather than a separate construction: a degree modifier combines with the independently lexicalized stative 好食. Retaining a language-level DegreeModifiedLexicalStative node would duplicate the general degree-stative construction and make one lexical example look like a productive class. The runtime wrapper may remain for implementation convenience only. Status recommendation: move to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve the exact 好好食 evidence under the general degree-stative construction and the 好食 lexical entry

records.profile_description: Overt 好 directly modifies an independently licensed property or stative predicate in copula-less predication, optionally with an overt subject, topic, or embedding clause, as in 今日好凍, 佢好高, and 我覺得佢好開心. The profile excludes 幾耐 and 幾多 quantity or duration expressions, 好 modifying material inside a nominal phrase such as 好大壓力, and any claim that every degree marker or lexicalized 好-X expression belongs to this UUID.

source_terms.term: predicative adjectives are verb-like and degree-modified

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DegreeStativePredicate contains a strong and repeatedly tested 好 + property-predicate core, but its runtime positives also include wh-duration, wh-quantity, and nominal-modifier material. HouMarkedPropertyPredicate identifies the dominant source-supported construction without claiming that all degree expressions are stative predicates. The same UUID is retained for the 好-marked predicative core; unrelated branches require independent homes. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for overt 好 + property predication; remove wh-quantity, duration, nominal-modifier, and other unrelated degree branches during compatibility migration

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by DelimitedVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
No independent Cantonese-language claim is attached to the broad compatibility name DemonstrativeClassifierNP.
The label omitted the overt classifier required in the relevant demonstrative-classifier-noun forms, had no constructor or output, and duplicated the already implemented overt-head family.
Overt D+Num+CL+N remains a legitimate future research target, but no runtime node or fixture uses this label. Recreate a narrowly specified subtype only when evidence and implementation work begin.

An overt subject is followed by lexical 想 and a visible VP complement, as in 我想去 and 我想講吓. The profile excludes 要 + VP obligation or desire readings, 想 + NP, 諗住 + VP, and any topic or coverb material outside the 想-complement core.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DesiderativeVP is semantically plausible but too broad because the evidence distinguishes 想, 要, and other desire or obligation expressions rather than licensing one interchangeable desiderative marker. The runtime positives consistently instantiate overt subject + 想 + VP, so the permanent identity is narrowed and renamed to that lexical complement profile without changing its UUID. Status recommendation: retain research_pending under the lexeme-specific 想 + VP identity; keep 要 and other desire, obligation, intention, or preference predicates in separate profiles

records.profile_description: An overt 啲 is followed by an overt noun, optionally with an overt possessor before 啲, as in 啲書, 啲糖, and 你啲錢. The profile describes the nominal expression itself and does not infer object role, exact quantity, definiteness, partitivity, or a hidden classifier from surface 啲 + noun.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DiMarkedNP is defensible but underspecified. DiMarkedNounNP makes the required overt noun visible and prevents examples occurring as objects from turning the nominal identity into an object construction. The same UUID is retained because the source-supported di1-N core is present in every current positive. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for overt 啲 + noun nominal expressions until exact source-linked positives, semantic boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: An implementation aggregate over a manner-motion predicate and heterogeneous directional material, including postverbal path/deictic complexes, lexical 去 plus a goal, preverbal 向 direction phrases, and larger source-to-goal clauses. These components have different orders, relations, and constituency and are not established as one Cantonese construction.

source_terms.term: manner verb plus complex path expression

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy label names a semantic event type but masks several independently organized constructions. Its positives differ in marker position, path complexity, goal realization, source realization, and motion-participant structure. The UUID should therefore preserve only compatibility aggregation; linguistic evidence must remain attached to the independently bounded component records. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve manner motion, preverbal direction phrases, postverbal directional complexes, goals, and source phrases as independently typed structures

records.profile_description: The sourced phenomenon is better represented through independently typed causative/result and directional relations; the dormant umbrella contributes no unique behavior.

A lexical motion predicate such as 去, 嚟, 走, or locational-directional 落 functions as the clause's independent predicate, optionally with an overt goal. Aspect, negation, modality, particles, and clause embedding are independently represented outer structures. The profile excludes postverbal directional uses after manner or caused-motion predicates, multi-part directional complexes, and compatibility matches triggered merely by a motion word anywhere in a larger clause.

source_terms.term: independent motion predicates 落, 去, and 嚟

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DirectionalMotionVP is too broad and conflates independent lexical motion predicates with directional complements and larger motion constructions. The source-supported independent-predicate core is nevertheless clear and widespread in the current suite, so the UUID is retained and narrowed rather than internalized. The new name exposes the decisive predicative boundary. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for independently predicative lexical motion verbs; remove postverbal directional-complement, caused-motion, multi-part directional, and mere containing-clause branches during compatibility migration

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by DiscourseParticleFrame; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
The exact frame fused modal, disposal marker, object, and lexical change predicate.

The exact lexical sequence 話 + overt participant + 知, as in 我唔話你知. The profile excludes substitution of 講 for 話, substitution of another cognition predicate for 知, and any inference that the sequence is an unrestricted ditransitive or serial-verb construction.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DitransitiveSpeechVP makes two claims the evidence does not settle: that the sequence is syntactically ditransitive and that it forms a productive speech-verb class. The current matcher is an exact lexical 話…知 profile. WaaParticipantZiCommunicationVP names the overt sequence and domain without resolving the competing complement or serial analyses. Status recommendation: migrate to lexicalized_only unless independent evidence establishes a broader productive 話/講 + participant + cognition-predicate class; retain the exact sequence and its boundaries

records.profile_description: A lexical predicate is followed by continuative 住 and an overt object, as in 戴住眼鏡 and the source-linked 陪住你. The profile represents continuation or maintenance of an activity or state without treating 住 as generic progressive aspect. It excludes 緊, bare duration expressions, perfective 咗, and unsupported free extension to every verb-object combination.

source_terms.term: 住 as continuous activity or state without change
緊 progressive versus 住 maintained state

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. DurativeVP hides the overt marker and can be misread as any temporally extended predicate. The actual runtime and strongest evidence support a much narrower V + 住 + overt-object profile with continuative or maintained-state meaning. The UUID is retained because the single executable positive fits that core directly. Status recommendation: retain research_pending under the overt V + 住 + object profile until lexical compatibility, negative boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: The exact 都算 + price wrapper lacked direct evidence and duplicated lexical 算 evaluation.

An overt subject is followed by lexical 有 and an overt nominal complement expressing possession or availability, as in 佢有時間 and 我有書. The profile excludes subjectless presentational or existential 有 + NP, locative existential clauses, auxiliary or modal 有 + VP, age expressions such as 有三歲, and negative 冇 profiles unless separately established.

source_terms.term: 有 as a verb for possession with an explicit subject
existential 有 without an overt subject

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ExistentialClause is contradicted by its own executable positives and by the checked source distinction. The dominant implemented core is explicit-subject possessive or availability 有 + nominal complement, while true subjectless presentational existentials already have a separate project identity. The UUID is therefore retained and renamed to the source-aligned possessive profile; the age example is quarantined. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for overt-subject possessive 有 + nominal complement; remove age and nonpossessive branches during compatibility migration and leave presentational existential structures in their separate identity

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ExistentialPresentationalClause; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ExistentialQuestion; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An overt 有 is followed by wh determiner 咩 and an overt noun, as in 有咩書, with any following clause-final particle represented outside the narrow question core. The profile does not assert one uniform existential, possessive, or availability analysis, does not cover other wh expressions such as 幾多 or 做乜, and does not license an omitted noun after 咩.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ExistentialWhQuestion is too broad in both analysis and wh inventory. The runtime positives establish only an overt 有 + 咩 + noun surface profile, while the source confirms the broader availability of in-situ wh material with 有 without proving the runtime's exact template or one existential interpretation. JauMeNounWhQuestion preserves the observable core and leaves interpretation unresolved. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the overt 有 + 咩 + noun profile until exact source support, interpretation boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ExperientialClause; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

The source-linked sequence 去 + experiential 過 + overt destination or goal NP, as in 去過美國. The profile excludes perfective 去咗, non-motion experiential predicates such as 見過, other motion verbs, and unreviewed destination types.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ExperientialMotionGoalVP implies a productive combination of experiential aspect with a motion-goal class. The implementation and direct evidence establish only 去過 with an overt goal. HeoiGwoGoalVP makes that lexical and aspectual boundary explicit while preserving a separate path for future broader motion research. Status recommendation: retain research_pending; do not generalize beyond 去過 + overt goal until other motion predicates, destination classes, corpus examples, panel judgments, and held-out cases are reviewed

records.profile_description: A question containing overt experiential 過 before clause-final 未, optionally followed by a final particle, as in 你飲過茶未 or 你食過醉雞未呀. The profile excludes preverbal 未 + V過 negative statements and 有冇 + V過 questions.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ExperientialQuestion is too broad because the repository contains separate 有冇 and other experiential-question strategies. The runtime identity is specifically the overt 過 plus final 未 pattern. GwoFinalMeiExperientialQuestion exposes both defining markers and prevents evidence from transferring to other question types. Status recommendation: retain research_pending until predicate and object diversity, final-particle variants, negative boundaries, corpus evidence, a role-neutral panel wave, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: An overt lexical predicate is followed by experiential 過 and an overt object, as in 食過飯, 做過呢件事, or 講過電話. Preverbal 有冇, subjects, final particles, and larger question structure are outside the narrow VP profile. The profile excludes perfective 咗, unmarked predicates, objectless 過 uses, lexical motion 去過 + goal handled by its separate identity, and final-未 experiential questions handled by their separate identity.

source_terms.term: inner and outer aspect compatibility restrictions

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ExperientialVP is linguistically plausible but too unspecific for a repository that already separates 去過-goal and V過...未 question profiles. Every current positive contains overt 過 after a lexical predicate and an overt following object. GwoMarkedExperientialObjectVP exposes that exact core and prevents outer 有冇 question structure or sibling experiential constructions from inheriting its evidence. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for overt V + 過 + object experiential predicates until predicate and object scope, aspect-combination boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ExperientialYesNoQuestion; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by FocusParticleFrame; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Particular conventional Cantonese expressions may instantiate the behavior represented by FormulaDiscourseUnit; productivity is not assumed.

An implementation aggregate that marks an utterance as an answer relative to supplied discourse context. Current positives include affirmative and negative modal or evaluative predicates such as 可以, 唔可以, 要, 唔使, 得, and 唔得, as well as the complete cognition clause 我覺得啱. These forms do not share one demonstrated fragment syntax, ellipsis operation, complement type, or hidden proposition.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. FragmentAnswer conflates a discourse relation with several unrelated surface structures and even labels one complete clause as a fragment. The sources do not justify a single shared syntax, and the runtime positives are structurally heterogeneous. The UUID should therefore preserve only compatibility-level answer metadata while linguistic evidence remains attached to the independently bounded constructions that realize each response. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve answer-relation metadata separately from the independently typed modal, negation, cognition, aspectual-ellipsis, and nominal structures that realize particular responses

records.profile_description: A context-dependent thematic continuation question is formed by an overt topic expression followed by final 呢, as in 你呢, or by bare 呢 when the relevant discourse alternative is recoverable. The profile records only the overt topic-plus-呢 or bare-呢 question surface and does not reconstruct an omitted clause, assert a null topic, or cover complete wh, polar, or A-not-A questions.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. FragmentQuestion is too broad because the runtime contains only 呢-marked thematic continuation questions. NeMarkedThematicContinuationQuestion names the visible marker and discourse function without treating every incomplete-looking question as one construction or reconstructing omitted material. The same UUID is retained because both current positives share the overt 呢 core. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for context-dependent thematic continuation questions marked by final 呢 until exact bare-呢 evidence, discourse boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: An overt motion predicate is followed by 到 and an overt goal expression, as in 行到學校 and 返到屋企. The profile preserves the visible motion-到-goal sequence while leaving resultative, attainment, potential, and context-sensitive interpretation to separately recorded evidence. It excludes bare motion predicates, independent motion predicates with goals but no 到, postverbal directional complexes without this sequence, caused-motion structures, and non-motion uses of 到.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. GoalAttainmentMotionVP presupposes a single attainment analysis where the visible runtime core is simply motion predicate + 到 + overt goal. The sources support that sequence but leave theoretical and contextual distinctions open. MotionVerbDouGoalVP therefore retains the UUID, exposes the form-based boundary, and prevents evidence from spreading to bare motion, caused motion, or unrelated 到 uses. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for motion predicate + 到 + overt goal until interpretation, aspect placement, motion-verb and goal scope, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: An overt demonstrative followed by an overt classifier forms an NP without an overt noun in the construction span, as in 呢本 and the NP 呢個 in 呢個係問題. The profile is kept distinct from demonstrative-classifier-noun phrases and numeral-classifier-noun phrases and does not reconstruct a hidden noun or claim unrestricted discourse licensing.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The construction is a genuine surface subtype, but headless can imply a specific ellipsis or null-noun analysis that Canto Span explicitly does not assert. DemonstrativeClassifierNPWithoutOvertNoun names the observable sequence and cleanly contrasts it with AB15 DemonstrativeClassifierNounNP without reconstructing omitted material. Status recommendation: retain research_pending and quarantine from promotion until at least one stronger independent source, exact source-linked positives, discourse-sensitive negative boundaries, corpus review, and role-neutral panel evidence are available

records.profile_description: The broad 就係 fallback inferred autonomous fragment status without a source-backed boundary.
The exact 邊個嚟 fallback was unsourced and differed from sourced copular and explanatory identity structures.

An implementation aggregate over several subjectless or environmentally framed predicate types: conventional weather-event predicates such as 落雨 and 打風, the daylight-transition predicate 天光, and ambient degree-property predicates such as 好凍 or 好熱 when licensed by overt temporal or spatial framing. These branches do not establish one shared Cantonese argument structure, valency class, subject analysis, or environmental construction.

source_terms.term: 落雨喇 without an overt nominal
distinct ambient-quality and weather-event predicate structures

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ImpersonalEnvironmentalClause assigns one clause identity to branches whose overt structures and source support are different. The matcher itself distinguishes conventional weather events, 天光 transition, and ambient degree-property predication, then places some of them inside temporal or locative wrappers. EnvironmentalPredicateClauseWrapper preserves the compatibility aggregate without allowing those branches to transfer evidence to one another or compete as one language construction. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve conventional weather events, daylight transitions, ambient property predication, and temporal or spatial framing as independently typed structures

records.profile_description: A source-linked profile in which an overt resource, object, or artifact is related through 用嚟 or 用來 to a following VP expressing its stated use or function, as in 呢隻杯我用嚟飲水. The profile excludes ordinary instrumental 用 without 嚟/來, malformed markerless strings, and unrestricted omitted-resource or alternative-marker analyses.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. IntendedFunctionRelation is semantically plausible but opaque to discovery and reads like an internal graph edge. The runtime and test boundary are defined by overt 用嚟/用來, not by a general machine-inferred intention relation. JungLaiUseFunctionConstruction names the overt marker and the narrow conventional use/function contribution while remaining neutral about topic, subject, serial-verb, and affordance analyses. Status recommendation: retain research_pending; do not promote until resource/topic structure, omitted-resource licensing, alternative markers, corpus diversity, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out boundaries are resolved

records.profile_description: An overt subject followed by lexical 諗住 and a visible VP complement. The record preserves the source-linked intention reading without treating that interpretation as the only meaning of 諗住, and excludes the current subjectless and nominal-content paths from this exact runtime subtype.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy label assigns one semantic reading to a polysemous lexeme and uses the vague head Frame. The executable profile is structural and lexeme-specific: overt subject + 諗住 + VP. NamZyuVPComplementClause makes that boundary searchable and preserves the intention reading as source-linked interpretation metadata rather than permanent identity. Status recommendation: retain research_pending under the neutral form-based name; preserve intention, thought, assumption, and planning readings as unresolved lexical-semantic alternatives rather than encoding intention categorically

records.profile_description: An implementation span used when a clause-relation segment consists of one visible action predicate and no overt following object, as in 笑 or context-linked 同意. Surface object absence does not establish lexical intransitivity, exclude a discourse-recoverable null object, identify an omitted complement, or prove that all matched lexemes share one valency class.

source_terms.term: 同意 agreement response in a supplied discourse frame

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy name converts a parser observation—one visible action predicate with no overt object—into a lexical valency judgment. The implementation is explicitly a relation-member fallback, and the source record warns that Cantonese permits context-sensitive object omission. BareActionPredicateRelationMember therefore preserves the exact parser function while removing unsupported intransitivity and hidden-argument conclusions. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; represent independently established lexical intransitivity separately from discourse-conditioned object or complement omission and from clause-relation segmentation

records.profile_description: Lexical 畀 or 俾, optionally preceded by an overt person-denoting subject, is followed by an overt theme or thing-denoting nominal and then an overt recipient-candidate person nominal, as in 我畀錢你 and 畀本書佢. An immediately postverbal 咗 is represented as independent aspect. The profile excludes person-before-thing order, simplified 给 without separate Cantonese orthographic evidence, passive or permissive 畀, post-theme linker uses, omitted arguments, and any claim of free order alternation.

source_terms.term: lexical 畀 with theme before beneficiary or recipient
distinct dative construction types and meanings
sparse and mixed evidence for alternative order and weight
interaction of order, lexical choice, thematic role, and weight

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. LexicalGiveRelation is too abstract and currently covers two orders that the matcher itself treats differently. The strongest common source-backed profile is lexical 畀/俾 followed by theme and recipient candidate. BeiThemeRecipientGiveVP exposes the overt predicate and order, retains the UUID for the defensible baseline, and prevents unresolved person-before-thing or unverified orthographic branches from inheriting its evidence. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for lexical 畀/俾 with overt theme-before-recipient order; quarantine person-before-thing and 给 branches from this UUID until each has independent form-specific evidence, role analysis, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: An overt place or spatial-domain expression is followed by existential 有 or negative existential 冇 and an overt introduced nominal, as in 屋企有本書, 枱上面有支筆, or 屋企冇人. The place expression is not forced to be a grammatical subject or topic, and no expletive is inserted. The profile excludes explicit-subject possession, static 喺 clauses, existential-presentational clauses with a following locative coda, and the older topic + 入面/入邊 + wh/focus + 有 compatibility formula.

source_terms.term: place expression + 冇 + nominal negative existential
existential introduction without an overt subject
place-first existential sentence without a preposition

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. LocativeExistentialClause is broadly recognizable, but it leaves the decisive surface order and polarity markers implicit and currently absorbs an unrelated interior wh/focus formula. PlaceInitialJauMouExistentialClause retains the UUID for the directly supported place + 有/冇 + NP core while keeping possessive, presentational, static-locative, and legacy interior-formula evidence separate. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for overt place + 有/冇 + introduced NP; remove the interior wh/focus compatibility formula from this UUID unless independent evidence establishes it as the same construction, then complete polarity, location, NP, corpus, panel, and held-out boundaries

records.profile_description: A bare locative phrase did not independently establish fragment or ellipsis structure.

An implementation aggregate whose first child is an overt place or spatial-domain expression, followed by one of several independently structured predicates: a property predicate such as 好靜, a positioning predicate with aspect and an overt postverbal theme such as 擺咗部電話, or an ambient environmental property wrapper such as 好熱. The aggregate does not establish one locative construction or determine whether the place is subject, topic, frame, or oblique.

source_terms.term: locative inversion analysis under theoretical debate
separate place expressions, ambient descriptions, and weather events

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. LocativeFrameClause is a compatibility wrapper over branches with different predicate structures and different research questions. The matcher distinguishes property, positioning, and ambient subtypes and deliberately leaves the place expression's grammatical relation unresolved. PlaceInitialPredicateClauseWrapper preserves that implementation function while preventing one branch's evidence from promoting the others. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve place-initial property predication, place-initial positioning or locative-inversion candidates, and location-framed ambient properties as separate language-level research profiles

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by LocativePlacePhrase; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An implementation wrapper that aggregates an overt posture predicate, locative 喺度 material, and a following action VP. The wrapper is not itself established as one Cantonese construction: posture-location predication and the following action, purpose, or serial relation require independently typed analyses.

source_terms.term: contextually locative or progressive 喺度

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. LocativePostureVP suggests that posture plus location is the node's complete boundary, but the executable positive requires another action and the bare posture-locative string is explicitly absent. The research supports the posture-locative strategy more directly than the aggregate. The current UUID should therefore describe the implementation wrapper and cease competing for linguistic promotion. Status recommendation: move to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve or create separate language-level identities for the source-supported posture-locative profile and any independently justified following-action relation

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by LocativeWhQuestion; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
No direct Cantonese grammar claim; this is a parser disposition for unresolved or malformed input.

A reduplicated property expression followed by overt adverbializer 咁 or 噉 and a following action VP. The construction identity excludes the currently reachable bare reduplicated-property fallback unless that separate route receives independent evidence and boundaries.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. MannerAdverbialVP is broader than the evidence and hides the overt adverbializer and reduplication that define the supported path. The same UUID can be retained for the source-linked overt profile, but the bare fallback must not inherit this identity or its source weight. GamMarkedReduplicatedMannerVP makes the marker and reduplicated form explicit without importing the source's theory-specific syntactic-height analysis. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the overt 咁／噉 profile; remove, quarantine, or separately internalize the bare reduplicated fallback before any promotion review

records.profile_description: Canto Span does not claim that MeasureExpression is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is an internal structural representation.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ModalANotAQuestion; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Modal and lexical change predication compose independently without a dedicated outer node.
The label conflates modal structure, ellipsis, and discourse response. Existing components preserve the distinctions; no separate runtime fragment is justified.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ModalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ModifiedNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ModifierNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
The movement + action + 吓 cross-product conflated purpose linkage with delimitative aspect.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by MotionGoalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by MotionPurposeChain; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An overt subject followed by personal naming predicate 叫 and a visible personal name, as in 我叫 Chris. The profile excludes category or alternative-designation 叫做 and the distinct surname predicate 姓, and does not claim broader naming syntax.

source_terms.term: 叫做 category or alternative designation

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. NamingClause is structurally vague and could include 叫做, 姓, copular identification, category labeling, or naming events. The actual runtime profile is personal 叫 + name with an overt subject. PersonalGiuNameClause names the lexical predicate and semantic subtype while preserving separate identities for surname and designation constructions. Status recommendation: retain research_pending; expand personal-name forms, subject types, discourse contexts, and negative boundaries before any productivity review

records.profile_description: No direct Cantonese grammar claim; this is a parser disposition for unresolved or malformed input.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegatedDirectionalMotionVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegatedExistentialClause; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegatedExistentialFragment; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
The label conflated opaque lexical negative meaning in 難X units, compositional 唔 negation of lexical property predicates, and the distinct prohibitive 唔好 profile.

Overt 唔 directly precedes an independently licensed property predicate without an inserted copula. The profile excludes negative nominal predicates requiring 唔係, other negators such as 冇, 未, and 咪, and unrestricted lexical extension beyond independently maintained property-predicate categories.

source_terms.term: 唔 directly negating a property predicate

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. NegatedStativePredicate is broadly reasonable, but it hides the overt negator and permits confusion with other negative strategies or lexicalized negative statives. M4NegatedPropertyPredicate states the exact marker and the independently licensed property-predicate boundary while preserving the crucial no-copula contrast with nominal predication. Status recommendation: retain research_pending; complete lexical-scope, corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation before productive support

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegatedVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegativeCognitionFragment; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An implementation wrapper grouping two overt but independently motivated negative experiential profiles: preverbal 未 followed by a V過 predicate and aspectual-negative 冇 followed by a V過 predicate. The wrapper excludes clause-final 未 experiential questions, 有冇 experiential questions, non-experiential 未V, general 唔 negation, and prohibitive 咪.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. NegativeExperiential looks like one language construction, but the runtime label combines two different preverbal negators. The research explicitly distinguishes aspectual-negative 冇 from 未 and from other negative and interrogative strategies. The existing UUID should therefore describe the implementation umbrella and cease competing for linguistic promotion. Marker-specific language records should be created separately after collision review and exact boundary specification. Status recommendation: move the umbrella UUID to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; create separate permanent language-construction UUIDs for the 未 + V過 and 冇 + V過 profiles only after their distinct semantic and distributional boundaries are recorded

records.profile_description: The label collapses distinct possession, existence, and event-negation profiles. It has no active implementation and should not remain as an undifferentiated construction.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegativePotentialComplement; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegativePotentialDirectionalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Canto Span does not claim that NominalHeadSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is an internal neutral span over overt nominal material.
Bare, 嘅-marked, classifier-linked, relative, and nominal-complement structures require separate boundaries; the dormant umbrella adds no unique parser behavior.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NominalPredicateClause; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

The checked source directly attests `你覺得佢哋點樣？`, with an overt experiencer, cognition predicate, evaluated referent, and evaluative wh predicate. The parser retains that exact structural profile while leaving other cognition-question complement types to independent composition.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by OpinionStanceFrame; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

Checked evidence distinguishes true ordinal determination from lexicalized or contextual `第二` expressions meaning next, another, or other. The runtime retains its headed ordinal + classifier + noun path, while source-attested headless `第二個` choice uses do not enter `OrdinalClassifierNP`.

An overt demonstrative followed by an overt classifier and overt noun, with no numeral in the construction span. The profile excludes headless demonstrative-classifier NPs, numeral-classifier-noun phrases, bare classifier-noun phrases, and classifier-noun combinations outside the independently maintained compatibility inventory.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The construction is a genuine, source-supported demonstrative-classifier-noun subtype. The legacy name is not false, but it is awkward and less discoverable because the noun is represented only indirectly as an overt head. DemonstrativeClassifierNounNP states the actual sequence, aligns with the strongest distributional descriptions, and remains neutral among competing NP structures. Status recommendation: retain research_pending; reopen a promotion track only after the negative-boundary inventory, current code-location audit, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: An implementation wrapper over an NP1 + 畀 or 俾 + NP2 + VP surface that preserves candidate passive, indirect-passive, permissive, and causative readings when the isolated string and current lexical information do not determine one analysis. The wrapper is not itself one Cantonese construction and must preserve the independently analyzed VP and all overt participants.

source_terms.term: bei-NP-VP causative and passive corpus classes

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. PassivePermissiveRelation treats distinct constructions and context-dependent interpretations as one language-level relation. The sources instead make their distinctions central, and the two source-linked fixtures deliberately represent different readings. The UUID should preserve ambiguity as an internal wrapper while future language records receive separate permanent identities and exact boundaries. Status recommendation: migrate the umbrella to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; allocate separate language-construction UUIDs for source-bounded permissive, canonical passive, indirect passive, and any independently justified causative profiles

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by PathPhrase; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by PerfectiveDirectionalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
The weather-specific 停咗雨 bundle duplicated ordinary perfective transitive structure.

The dedicated 解決咗 constructor was consumed by ordinary PerfectiveVP composition before complete output and contributed no independently sourced boundary beyond lexical predicate plus perfective aspect.
Cantonese perfective 咗 may follow an inner aspect/result element such as 完 before an overt object; broader PerfectiveVP productivity remains only provisional.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by PolarQuestionFrame; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An implementation wrapper that groups an overt request or politeness formula, an optional addressee, directive material, and optional manner material. It is not itself a single Cantonese clause construction and must not make 請, 唔該, and 麻煩 interchangeable.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The sources support multiple request strategies and pragmatically distinct lexical markers, not one productive PoliteImperativeClause. The runtime wrapper is useful only as an aggregate representation. It should therefore be internalized and decomposed while preserving every overt component and the existing compatibility alias during migration. Status recommendation: move to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve formula, directive, addressee, and manner structures as independently typed components

records.profile_description: An overt pronominal possessor followed directly by an overt classifier and overt noun, as in 我架車 and 佢本書. The current subtype excludes possessor + 嘅 + noun, classifier-less possessor–noun adjacency, headless forms, numeral-bearing forms, and full nominal possessors until those receive separate runtime and boundary review.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. PossessiveClassifierNP is not false, but it hides the overt noun and overstates the runtime's possessor coverage. PronounPossessorClassifierNounNP states the implemented sequence and leaves the broader full-NP possessor family available for later independent construction records. It also distinguishes this subtype from 嘅-marked possession and headless classifier phrases. Status recommendation: retain research_pending under the pronominal possessor subtype; do not generalize to full nominal possessors, demonstrative-bearing forms, headless readings, or unrestricted classifier productivity without separate evidence and tests

records.profile_description: Possessor+嘅, possessor+classifier, and headless possessives require separate analyses; the unused umbrella risks hiding those distinctions.
Headless possessive nominals can be represented by nominal structure plus fragment status; no independent dormant fragment node is needed.
Component evidence did not license the combined possession-plus-transfer wrapper.

An overt predicate and theme followed by 畀 or 俾 and an overt participant NP, as in 買咗杯咖啡畀佢. The record preserves the surface sequence without forcing a single recipient, beneficiary, goal, agent, source, preposition, or serial-verb analysis.

source_terms.term: double object and serial verb constructions

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy name is appropriately cautious about semantic role but reads like an internal graph edge rather than a language construction and omits the overt 畀/俾 marker that makes the profile discoverable. BeiMarkedPostThemeParticipantConstruction preserves the neutral stance required by the competing analyses while naming the actual surface boundary. Status recommendation: retain research_pending until the exact surface family is expanded beyond one positive fixture, its competing analyses are documented at profile level, and panel plus held-out boundaries are complete

records.profile_description: No inspected source established 有 + NP + 冇; analogy from adjacent 有冇 is insufficient.

A lexical verb followed by perfective 咗 and an overt NP object. The profile excludes objectless V–咗, inner-aspect or result material before 咗, motion-goal perfectives, experiential 過, and progressive 緊. Predicate–object compatibility is adjudicated separately from recognition of the overt perfective structure.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy name identifies the marker as postverbal but omits the overt object that defines this runtime subtype. Research supports a broader outer-perfective system, including 咗 after inner aspectual material; the runtime intentionally implements only the simple verb–咗–object profile. ZoMarkedPerfectiveObjectVP is therefore a more exact, theory-light canonical name while outer-aspect terminology remains source-linked metadata. Status recommendation: retain research_pending until reviewed corpus evidence, a locked role-neutral panel wave, and held-out validation are complete

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by PotentialDirectionalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by PotentialResultVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An overt subject followed by lexical 鍾意 and a visible VP complement, as in 我鍾意聽音樂. The current subtype excludes a bare activity VP without 鍾意 and complementless or independently negated 鍾意, and does not generalize to other preference predicates or nominal complements.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. PreferenceVP is semantically broad and could include nominal preference, comparative preference, lexical alternatives, or discourse-level stance. The executable path is lexeme-specific and complement-sensitive. ZungJiVPComplementClause exposes the overt predicate and the required VP complement while keeping unresolved aspect and complementation analyses outside the permanent name. Status recommendation: retain research_pending under the lexical 鍾意 + VP complement profile; investigate complement classes, aspect placement, negation, omitted subjects, and other preference predicates independently

records.profile_description: A clause containing an overt action VP followed by postverbal 先 with a priority or do-this-first interpretation, optionally followed by a final particle, as in 你打電話先啦. The subtype excludes preverbal 先 and formulaic or elliptical strings such as 第二時先啦, and does not collapse all postverbal 先 meanings into one construction.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. PriorityMarkerClause names an interpretation but not the overt distribution that defines the runtime. PostverbalSinPriorityClause makes the marker position and priority subtype discoverable while avoiding the false claim that all 先 uses share one syntax or meaning. Preverbal, formulaic, preparatory, and other postverbal profiles remain separate. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the action-VP + postverbal 先 priority subtype; keep other postverbal, preverbal, preparatory, and particleized 先 profiles separate until their distributions and interpretations are independently specified

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ProductiveVO; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ProgressiveDirectionalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Progressive aspect and in-situ locative wh syntax compose independently.
The exact unlinked progressive-plus-VP fallback inferred purpose from adjacency.
The internal V緊O child duplicated the active ProgressiveVP analysis.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ProgressiveVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ProgressiveWhObjectQuestion; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Overt prohibitives belong under marker-sensitive imperative analysis, while formulas such as 唔好意思 require lexical protection. No separate bare fragment construction is established.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ProhibitiveImperative; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Ordinary V+O form is not intrinsically purposive.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by QuantifiedClassifierNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
The runtime preserves overt quantity + person-head material in a bounded NP. The sources do not support a special person-only syntax or a fixed subject/object interpretation.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by QuantifiedTimeNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by QuantityNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by RepetitiveComplementVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ReportedSpeech; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.

An overt resource-like NP appears initially and is followed directly by 用嚟 or 用來 plus a visible use or function VP, without a separate overt user between the resource and 用嚟, as in 呢隻杯用嚟飲水 and 呢張紙用來寫字. The profile excludes ordinary instrumental 用, general purposive 嚟, separate-user forms, modal or copular frames, negation, A-not-A, and aspect-interrupted actual-use forms from this exact subtype.

source_terms.term: purposive 用嚟 with separate user and actual-use event

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. The legacy name is semantically understandable but reads like an internal graph edge and omits the word-order distinction that separates this runtime subtype from AA73. ResourceInitialJungLaiFunctionClause makes the overt resource, marker, and no-separate-user clause profile discoverable while remaining neutral among instrumental-SVC, purposive, and conventionalized-expression analyses. Status recommendation: retain research_pending; keep separate from AA73's separate-user profile while recording both as siblings in the UsePurposeAndFunction family; do not promote until runtime scope, coordinated predicates, interpretation-sensitive panel evidence, corpus diversity, and held-out boundaries are resolved

records.profile_description: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by RestorativeComplementVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ResultComplement; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ResultComplementVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
The exact 好多/都 + 熟咗 wrapper conflated scope, lexical state, aspect, and particles.

An overt negative evaluator 唔算 followed by a property predicate, optionally preceded by an overt topic and/or focus adverb 都, as in 對皮鞋唔算貴, 價錢唔算貴, and 都唔算貴. The profile excludes nominal price-range expressions and unrelated scalar-value or price-noun predication, and does not license unrestricted property-predicate substitution.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ScalarEvaluation is substantially broader than the evidenced construction and risks reviving the retired price-domain ontology. The supported path is overt 唔算 with a property predicate, optionally in a topic or 都-marked context. M4SyunPropertyEvaluation makes that lexical marker explicit and preserves scalarity as interpretation metadata rather than a license for unrelated scalar structures. Status recommendation: retain research_pending for the source-linked 唔算 + property predicate profile; audit and quarantine category-compatible predicate extensions that lack direct evidence before any promotion review

records.profile_description: The fallback assigned fragment status to every core containing 價位 despite having no mapped source, accepted fixture, or independently supported boundary.

An implementation aggregate covering two independently supported question profiles: lexical price questions built around 幾錢 or 幾多錢, and compositional questions in which 幾 modifies a licensed scalar-dimension predicate such as 遠 or 長. The wrapper does not establish a single Cantonese construction shared by price and scalar-predicate questions.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. ScalarValueQuestion groups a lexical price expression and ordinary scalar-predicate composition under a semantic English-language umbrella. The sources and tests preserve the distinction rather than motivating one productive construction. The permanent UUID should therefore represent only the compatibility wrapper and cease competing for linguistic promotion. A parser role assigned to the overt resource appearing before a separate user in the narrow 用嚟 use-function profile, as in 呢隻杯我用嚟飲水. The role records surface placement without claiming that initial position alone diagnoses a Cantonese topic construction or settles whether the resource is a topic, subject, moved instrument, or another participant.

label_review.review_notes: Expert adjudication 2026-07-24. Topic is a broad syntactic-pragmatic analysis assigned from one construction-specific position. The source does not diagnose topic status, and the executable boundaries are really 用嚟-profile boundaries. Renaming the UUID as an internal preposed-resource role preserves the useful span while preventing one initial NP from licensing a general topic ontology. Status recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic and attach the role to the relevant 用嚟 construction profile; do not retain Topic as an independent language-construction candidate
